c.d: Reflects how easy the app is to use for beginners and professionals, considering the user interface and learning curve.
Number and quality of photo editing tools and effects available in the app (filters, AI tools, etc.).
Platforms on which the app is available (iOS, Android, Web, Windows, macOS).
The cost of the app, whether free, subscription-based, or one-time purchase, including in-app purchases.
How well the app uses Artificial Intelligence to enhance or automate photo editing processes.
